title: String Eval
description: Deterministic string-based evaluation metrics that score an answer against
an expected output. Supports exact match, substring contains, regex pattern,
BLEU, and ROUGE-L. No LLM calls required — zero latency quality gate.
Wire the answers lane to the LLM output and the text lane to a known expected answer.

output.description: Evaluation score: {score, passed, metric, threshold, reason}

input.description: Expected / ground-truth answer (required for all string metrics)

threshold.title: Pass Threshold
threshold.description: Minimum score to pass (0.0 – 1.0). exact_match and contains are binary (0 or 1).
